properties.description: SMAT PO EXTRACT - Source to ADLS Stage Folder

activities.name: cp_getSMAT_PO_data
activities.description: Run the Custom query to fetch PO Extract data from SMAT server (source) and copy into the Stage ADLS2.

oracleReaderQuery.value:
select DISTINCT 
       poh.po_number PO_NBR
     , poh.PO_SUPP PO_SUPPL
     , pohn.description PO_DESCR
     , poh.PO_ISSUE_DATE PO_ISSUE_DATE
     , poh.approved_date PO_APPR_DATE
     , sup.sup_code supplier_code
     , c.company_name SUPPLIER_NAME
     , CY.CY_CODE SUPPLIER_COUNTRY
     , poli.poli_pos PO_ITEM_POS
     , poli.poli_sub_pos PO_ITEM_SUB
     , its.ish_pos ish_POS
     , its.ish_sub_pos ITEM_SHIP_SUB
     , replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(m_abb_sys.CONVERT_IMP_MET(its.ident,DECODE('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.P_ZX_IMP_MET}','I','IMPERIAL','METRIC'),@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_nls_id})--P_ZX_IMP_MET--p_nls_id
       ||'; '|| m_abb_pck_bom.ident_cc_layout2(its.ident, 's',@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_nls_id}),--p_nls_id
       '-; '),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) ITEM_DESC
    , its.ish_ident_code IDENT_CODE
    , ic.ic_code CLIENT_IDENT_CODE
     , its.ish_tag_number TAG_NO
     , its.ish_commodity_code COMMODITY_CODE
     , its.ish_input_1  size1
     , its.ish_input_2  size2
     , its.ish_input_3  size3
     , its.ish_input_4  size4
     , its.item_ship_id item_ship_id
     , nvl(poli.poli_qty,0) TOTAL_POLI_QT
     , its.ish_item_ship_qty ITEM_SHIP_QTY
     ,   DECODE (NVL(ish1.cnt,0),0, nvl(its.ish_received_qty,0), 
          DECODE (its.master_ish_id,NULL,
                  DECODE((nvl(ish1.tot_shipped,0) - nvl(ish1.tot_recv,0)),0,'999999999999999999999999999999',nvl(ish1.tot_recv,0)),
                  nvl(its.ish_received_qty,0)) ) RECD_QTY
     , unt.unit_code UOM
     , poli.poli_unit_price UNIT_PRICE
     , untC.unit_code CURRENCY
     , dd.dd_code DELIVERY_DEIGNATION
     , rm.rm_code ROUTING_METHOD
     , its.ish_rev_FRT_CODE INCOTERM
     , its.ish_rev_freight_value DELIVERY_PLACE
     , to_char(its.ish_prom_contract_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') PROM_CONTRACT
     , to_char(its.ish_req_site_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') ROS_DATE
     , reln.reln_number RN_NUMBER
     , to_char(reln.reln_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') RN_DATE
     , nvl(its.ish_reln_qty,0) RN_QTY
     , reln.approved_date RB_APPR_DATE
     , reln.delv_date RN_DELIV_DATE
     , reln.READY_DATE RN_READY_DATE
     , irc.irct_number
     , irc.irct_date
     , irc.insp_date
     , its.ish_irc_qty IRC_QTY
     , mcs.mcs_number MCS_NR
     , TO_CHAR(mcs.mcs_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') MCS_DATE
     , itsw.ish_des_code_exwo HAND_OVER_DEST
     , itsw.ish_planned_date_exwo HAND_OVER_PLAN
     , itsw.ish_forecasted_date_exwo HAND_OVER_FCST
     , itsw.ish_actual_date_exwo HAND_OVER_ACT
     , itsw.ish_des_code_ship_1  SHIP_DEST_1
     , itsw.ish_planned_date_ship_1 SHIP_PLAN_1
     , itsw.ish_forecasted_date_ship_1 SHIP_FCST_1
     , itsw.ish_actual_date_ship_1 SHIP_ACT_1
     , itsw.ish_des_code_ship_2  SHIP_DEST_2
     , itsw.ish_planned_date_ship_2 SHIP_PLAN_2
     , itsw.ish_forecasted_date_ship_2 SHIP_FCST_2
     , itsw.ish_actual_date_ship_2 SHIP_ACT_2
     , itsw.ish_des_code_ship_3  SHIP_DEST_3
     , itsw.ish_planned_date_ship_3 SHIP_PLAN_3
     , itsw.ish_forecasted_date_ship_3 SHIP_FCST_3
     , itsw.ish_actual_date_ship_3 SHIP_ACT_3
     , itsw.ish_des_code_ta  TRAFF_ARR_DEST
     , itsw.ish_planned_date_ta TRAFF_ARR_PLAN
     , itsw.ish_forecasted_date_ta TRAFF_ARR_FCST
     , itsw.ish_actual_date_ta TRAFF_ARR_ACT
     , itsw.ish_des_code_aos  ARR_ON_SITE_DEST
     , itsw.ish_planned_date_aos ARR_ON_SITE_PLAN
     , itsw.ish_forecasted_date_aos ARR_ON_SITE_FCST
     , itsw.ish_actual_date_aos ARR_ON_SITE_ACT
     , csh.carrier_name MOC_CARRIER
     , csh.voy_flt_num MOC_VOYFLT_NUM 
     , csh.vessel_name MOC_NAME_1
     , csh.vessel2_name MOC_NAME_2
     , to_char(csh.etd_date ,'DD-Mon-YYYY')  MOC_ETD
     , to_char(csh.atd_date ,'DD-Mon-YYYY')  MOC_ATD
     , to_char(csh.eta_date ,'DD-Mon-YYYY')  MOC_ETA 
     , to_char(csh.ata_date ,'DD-Mon-YYYY') MOC_ATA
     , csh.loading_point MOC_LOADING_PT
     , csh.unloading_point MOC_UNLOADING_POINT
     , to_char(csh.awb_number ) MOC_BOL
     , usrb.first_name ||' '||usrb.last_name BUYER
     , usre.first_name ||' '||usre.last_name EXPEDITER
     , its.ish_r_code REQUISITION
     , its.ish_r_supp REQ_SUPP
     , its.ish_rli_pos REQ_LI
     , its.ish_rli_sub_pos REQ_SUB_LI
     , jb.job_number ACCOUNT_NUMBER

     , to_char(sd2.forecasted_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY')  forecasted_del_date	--FORECASTED DEL DATE
     , sd1.des_code irc_dest										--IRC DEST
     , to_char(sd1.planned_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') irc_plan				--IRC Plan date
     , to_char(sd1.forecasted_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') irc_fcst				--IRC forecast date
     , to_char(sd1.actual_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') irc_act					--IRC Actual date

from m_sys.m_po_headers poh, m_sys.m_companies c, m_sys.m_suppliers sup, m_sys.m_po_header_nls pohn 
     ,m_sys.m_company_addrs padrs, m_sys.m_addr_types adrtypes, m_sys.m_countries cy
     ,m_sys.m_po_line_items poli, m_sys.mvp_ish_all_reqs_workload its
     ,m_sys.m_units unt, m_sys.m_units untC, m_sys.m_delv_desigs dd, m_sys.m_routing_methods rm
     ,m_sys.MVP_ISH_WORKLOAD itsw
     ,m_sys.m_release_notes reln, m_sys.mvp_csd_workload csh , m_sys.m_users usrb, m_sys.m_jobs jb, m_sys.m_users usre
     ,m_sys.m_inspection_rel_certs irc
     ,m_sys.m_mcs_numbers mcs 
     ,(Select * from m_sys.m_ident_companies
           where company_id=@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.a_company_id}) ic --a_company_id         
     ,  (SELECT rp.base_poh_id,rp.r_id, rp.rli_id,rp.last_contact_date,rp.next_contact_date, rp.expediter,
              apoli.proj_id,apoli.poli_id
                FROM m_sys.m_actual_polis apoli,
                      m_sys.m_req_li_to_polis rltp,
                     m_sys.m_req_to_pos rp
                    WHERE rp.rli_id IS NULL and
                          rltp.r_id = rp.r_id
                          AND apoli.poli_id = rltp.poli_id 
                          AND EXISTS
                           (SELECT 1
                              FROM m_sys.m_po_to_base_pos ptbp
                             WHERE     ptbp.rp_id = rp.rp_id
                                   AND ptbp.poh_id = rltp.poh_id)
      ) all_rp

   ,( select a.poli_id POLI_ID, SUM(a.item_ship_qty) TOT_SHIPPED, 
            SUM(a.recv_on_site_qty) TOT_RECV,COUNT(a.poli_id) cnt
      from m_sys.m_item_ships a
      where 1=1 and master_ish_id is not null
       and a.proj_id = '@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_proj_id}' --p_proj_id
       group by a.poli_id) ish1

   ,(   select item_ship_id,des.des_code, itsd.planned_date, itsd.forecasted_date, itsd.actual_date  --Start of new table 1
            from m_sys.m_rm_schedules rms     
                ,m_sys.m_item_ship_dates itsd ,m_sys.m_destinations des
            where itsd.proj_id = '@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_proj_id}'			--p_proj_id
           --   and itsd.item_ship_id = p_data.item_ship_id--27239004
              and itsd.RMS_ID = rms.rms_id 
              and rms.des_id = des.des_id
              and rms.exped_date_type= 'IRC' )  SD1
  ,(   select isd.item_ship_id,isd.forecasted_date
     from m_sys.m_item_ship_dates isd,
          m_sys.m_rm_schedules rms
         , m_sys.m_item_ships ish
    where --ish.item_ship_id = p_data.item_ship_id and
       rms.rm_id(+) = ish.rm_id
      and rms.delv_date_ind(+) = 'Y'
      and isd.proj_id = '@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_proj_id}'				--p_proj_id			
      and ish.proj_id = '@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_proj_id}'			--p_proj_id
      and isd.item_ship_id = ish.item_ship_id
      and isd.rms_id(+) = rms.rms_id) SD2

where poh.proj_id = '@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_proj_id}' --p_proj_id
and poh.po_number like '@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_EXP_PO}'--A_EXP_PO
and sup.sup_id(+) = poh.sup_id
and c.company_id(+) = sup.company_id
and pohn.poh_id(+) = poh.poh_id
and pohn.nls_id(+) = @{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_nls_id} --p_nls_id
and adrtypes.address_type_code = 'MAIL TO'
and padrs.company_id = c.company_id  
and padrs.address_type_id = adrtypes.address_type_id 
and padrs.cy_id = cy.cy_id
and poli.poh_id = poh.poh_id
and its.poli_id = poli.poli_id
and its.proj_id = poh.proj_id
and NVL(its.ish_item_ship_qty,0)<>0 
and ic.ident(+) = its.ident
and unt.unit_id = its.qty_unit_id
and untC.unit_id = poli.currency_id
and dd.dd_id(+) = its.dd_id
and rm.rm_id(+) = its.rm_id
and itsw.item_ship_id(+) = its.item_ship_id
and itsw.proj_id = '@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_proj_id}'   --p_proj_id                           
and reln.reln_id(+) = its.reln_id
and csh.reln_id(+) = reln.reln_id
and usrb.m_usr_id = poh.buyer
and irc.irct_id (+)= its.irct_id  
and mcs.mcs_id (+) = its.mcs_id 
and usre.m_usr_id(+) = all_rp.expediter                             
and all_rp.proj_id(+) = its.proj_id
and all_rp.poli_id(+) = its.poli_id
and all_rp.base_poh_id = poh.base_poh_id
and jb.job_id(+) = poli.job_id
and its.poli_id = ish1.poli_id (+)

and sd1.item_ship_id(+) = its.item_ship_id  --New table Join condition
and sd2.item_ship_id(+) = its.item_ship_id   --New table Join condition

and decode('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_PR_SUPP}','%','1',sup.sup_code)=decode('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_PR_SUPP}','%','1','@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_PR_SUPP}') --A_PR_SUPP
and ((reln.approved_date is not null and UPPER(SUBSTR('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_APPR_RN}' , 1, 1)) = 'Y')--A_APPR_RN
      or (reln.approved_date is null and UPPER(SUBSTR('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_APPR_RN}' , 1, 1)) = 'N')--A_APPR_RN	
      or (1=1 and UPPER(SUBSTR('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_APPR_RN}' , 1, 1)) = '%')
    )
and ((itsw.ish_actual_date_aos is not null and UPPER(SUBSTR('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_AOS_ACT}' , 1, 1)) = 'Y')--A_AOS_ACT
      or (itsw.ish_actual_date_aos is null and UPPER(SUBSTR('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_AOS_ACT}' , 1, 1)) = 'N')--A_AOS_ACT
      or (1=1 and UPPER(SUBSTR('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.A_AOS_ACT}', 1, 1)) = '%')--A_AOS_ACT
    )
order by   
    POH.PO_NUMBER,poli.poli_pos, poli.poli_sub_pos,its.ish_pos,its.ish_sub_pos,POH.PO_SUPP;
